name: percus-review
description: Review cross-provider + conselho 3-membros Percus Fase 6. v6.1.0 adiciona Eixo C: conselho (DeepSeek + Llama via Groq + Cross-Claude subagent), providers/ registry, scripts/council-orchestrator (paralelo), commands /council:consult e /council:pre-mortem, hook pre-plan-exit (bloqueia ExitPlanMode em plano >500 linhas sem pre-mortem recente). Mantem v6.0.0: 5 hooks pre-commit (pre-commit-check, mock-scan R3, auth-import R7, migration-check R6, types-check R5), 5 skills (feature-flow R1 gate, close-milestone, catalog-publish, pages-scan, cookie-audit R7 subset), on-stop auto-dispara catalog-publish. Git hook nativo via /percus-review:install-git-hooks (Layer 2).
